character_dossiers.name: Captain Smollett
character_dossiers.biography: Responsible for the ship’s safety and crew discipline. Disputes with Mr. Arrow over conduct and drunkenness. Orders the cook and oversees powder arrangements.

character_dossiers.name: Doctor
character_dossiers.biography: Comments on the captain’s actions, references the fable of the mountain and the mouse. Believes two honest men are aboard.

character_dossiers.name: the squire
character_dossiers.biography: Expresses distrust of the captain. Mentions Long John Silver’s conduct. Witnesses powder arrangements.

character_dossiers.name: Mr. Arrow
character_dossiers.biography: Described as honest but later found drunk and disoriented. Disappears overboard.

character_dossiers.name: Long John Silver
character_dossiers.biography: Mentions by the squire as a crew member. Participates in crew chants and powder arrangements.

character_dossiers.name: Barbecue
character_dossiers.biography: Manages galley operations. Uses a crutch for mobility. Communicates with a parrot named Cap’n Flint.

character_dossiers.name: Mr. Trelawney
character_dossiers.biography: Involves in ship arrangements. Mentions selecting a mate and crew.

character_dossiers.name: Israel Hands
character_dossiers.biography: Experienced seaman. Confidant of Long John Silver. Observes crew dynamics.

character_dossiers.name: Job Anderson
character_dossiers.biography: Serves as de facto mate after Mr. Arrow’s disappearance. Oversees crew tasks.

character_dossiers.name: the parrot
character_dossiers.biography: Part of Barbecue’s galley setup. Recites phrases like 'Pieces of eight.'
